signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Get started with Blawby.
signup.termsAgreement: Creating an account means you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.

errors.userNotFound: No account for that email. Sign up first.
errors.accountExists: An account already uses that email.
errors.networkError: Lost connection. Check your internet and retry.

intake.accepted: Your intake was accepted. We'll let you know when the practice joins the conversation.
intake.rejected: Your intake was declined. You can sign in to follow up or submit a new request.
intake.pending: Intake submitted. A practice member will review and reply here.

authPrompt.title: Save this conversation
authPrompt.description: Sign up to keep your chat and get updates when the practice responds.
authPrompt.notificationWithPractice: We'll notify {{practiceName}} once you're signed in.
